TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == miculu' u icelang nu aadupen singangan aca tu miculu'ay aadupen, kunuyanay miculu', u mikitaduay tu icelang nu aadupen miculu'. malecad tu micukaymasay tu icelang nu tademaw a miculu', u matenesay tu ku mahiniay u mipiculu'ay. ayaw u kikay dada' ku sapiculu' nu tademaw, tabaki ku nipaini nu aadupen tu tademaw. mikitadu ku tademaw tu aadupen pawapen tu cayay kalecad a kawaw, tinaku miculuay tu tademaw anca miculu' tu tuud, saculil atu pakatineng. mahiniay ku picukaymas nu tademaw, taneng kakelul mikacaw i uzip nu aadupen, u sapiedap aduku anca miecaw tu aadupen lunukay mikawaw. mapaecaw, pahabay mala u sapiculu' aadupen pangangan han kunuy aadupen, zuma angangan kacawanay nu tademaw nu mikunuyay aadupen hina mapangangan tu malu u kakacawen mueneng. zuma a tademaw amisungaay tu balucu' nu tau, mitengil tu nipiculcul nu tau, culculan, cayay paacaenay ku piedap a miculu' tu baketay a tuud, mahiza miecaw tu mala miculu'ay aadupen, i lalangawanay tu mahiniay a tademaw atu misungaay tu tau a wayway pangangan han tu "kunuyay aadupen" mikawaway aadupen "working animal" mikawaway aadupen miedapay mikawaw tu tademaw a lumaay aadupen atu nipahabayan aadupen, u pasu miculu'ay tu tuud nu mikakawaway aadupen "mahiniay low-tow, mikunuyay a subayu", u mitengtengay aadupen "mahiniay mitengtengay a subayu, malukay a katalalan, mitengtengay a wacu i suleda" atu pakatenengay tu kawaw a mikawaway aadupen "mahiniay mikawaway a wacu', patigamiay a banul, mikeliday tu mamenu'ay a subayu". mikawaway aadupen a lalekalan a likisi namakayzaay ayaw likisi a tademaw, tusu a kasazuma katalalan, subayu. 20 se-ci teban a mihcaan tu zikez, u katalalan, subayu u mikawaway aadupen mapakutay nu simal autubay. . misiwkay Áį°šĽč tademaw micukaymas tu nipahabayay aadupen mumukuay tu baketay a anca mitengteng tu sakaluk a duku matenes tu mihcaan, ayaw nu si-yen 9000 a mihcaan, namapahabay ku aadupen hawsa, mala u mikutayay tu tademaw nu mimuku tu baketay a tuud. . tinaku katalalan nu Mey-su-pu-ta-mi-ya, Pey-o ay a nipahabayan a ngabul. u mitengtengay tu kazizeng aadupen ku mahiniay, nacaliway tu kalalacal, ayaw nu si-yen tu 2500 a mihcaan katukuh tu i In-tu, ayaw nu si-yen 1600 a mihcaan katukuh i Ay-ci, ayaw nu si-yen tu 1300 a mihcaan katukuh tu i Cong-kow, zuma, Ing-koway katukuh ayaw nu si-yen 500 a mihcaan kya malingatu mikawaw tu mahiniay a nalimaan. tademaw miculu'ay miculu' u icelang nu tademaw. malecad tu aadupen micukaymas tu aadupen miculu'ay, u matenesay tu ku mahiniay a piculu'. ayaw micukaymas tu kikay ku tademaw, uyni dada' u culu'. sakahenulan u mikawaway aadupen. naayaway a likisi atu Mey-su-pu-ta-mi-ya kanatal. subayu, u sapitengteng tu kazizeng anca salepacaw, mahiniay subayu kazizeng. li, adidi' ku nikan, micidekay a utubay atu icelang mikunuy. Iy-ci i ayaw nu si-yen 3000 a mihcaan micukaymas tu, Low, pikidamsayan tu li, subayu atu li malasheci ku kakatakis. wacu, mitengtenga' i suleda a wacu, wacu nu tayli, misebengay a wacu', mingaayay a wacu', miadupey a wacu' mikilimay a wacu', pahutinay a wacu' pazazanay tu mamenu'ay a wacu kahatini. zo, Nan-ya atu Tung-nan-ya kanatal, u sapilais ku zo atu miculu' i kilakilangan. damsayay a ngabul, u sienaway a kanatal. low-to, likelikenan a kanatal. ta-yang-to, Nan-mey talakaway buyu' a kanatal. nipahabanay a pabuy, taneng sapikilim tu sung-lu. nani', u mipatayay tu edu. yu, angangan u mung-yen-tyaw, u sapiadup. nipahabayan a banul, namapahabay mala u tigami a banul zikuz taneng u mibahelay nu patayzaay tu cudad a banul. makatalay nu mizakepay tu ayam, mahiniay cin-tyaw, li-ce-ing, yu-cin, hung-wi-kwang, u sapiadup tu palang. lu-ce, Tung-nan-ya a kitizaan, u sapibuting a lu-ce. Śģ∂ťīŅ: . malalitin tu i hekalay tu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu aadup…ôn siŇčaŇčan a ¶a tu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj aadup…ôn, kunujanaj mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °, u mikitaduaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu aadup…ôn mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °. mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu mi ¶ukajmasaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw a mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °, u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu ku mańßiniaj u mipi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj. ajaw u kikaj dada Ē~ ° ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw, tabaki ku nipaini nu aadup…ôn tu tad…ômaw. mikitadu ku tad…ômaw tu aadup…ôn pawap…ôn tu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kawaw, tinaku mi ¶ur~…ĺuaj tu tad…ômaw an ¶a mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tuud, sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu pakatin…ôŇč. mańßiniaj ku pi ¶ukajmas nu tad…ômaw, tan…ôŇč kak…ôr~…ĺur~…ĺ mika ¶aw i uzip nu aadup…ôn, u sapi…ôdap aduku an ¶a mi…ô ¶aw tu aadup…ôn r~…ĺunukaj mikawaw. mapa…ô ¶aw, pańßabaj mar~…ĺa u sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° aadup…ôn paŇčaŇčan ńßan kunuj aadup…ôn, zuma aŇčaŇčan ka ¶awanaj nu tad…ômaw nu mikunujaj aadup…ôn ńßina mapaŇčaŇčan tu mar~…ĺu u kaka ¶aw…ôn mu…ôn…ôŇč. zuma a tad…ômaw amisuŇčaaj tu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° nu tau, mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu nipi ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ nu tau, ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺan, ¶ajaj paa ¶a…ônaj ku pi…ôdap a mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu bak…ôtaj a tuud, mańßiza mi…ô ¶aw tu mar~…ĺa mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj aadup…ôn, i r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawanaj tu mańßiniaj a tad…ômaw atu misuŇčaaj tu tau a wajwaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "kunujaj aadup…ôn" mikawawaj aadup…ôn "workiŇč animar~…ĺ" mikawawaj aadup…ôn mi…ôdapaj mikawaw tu tad…ômaw a r~…ĺumaaj aadup…ôn atu nipańßabajan aadup…ôn, u pasu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tuud nu mikakawawaj aadup…ôn "mańßiniaj r~…ĺow-tow, mikunujaj a subaju", u mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj aadup…ôn "mańßiniaj mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a subaju, mar~…ĺukaj a katar~…ĺar~…ĺan, mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a wa ¶u i sur~…ĺ…ôda" atu pakat…ôn…ôŇčaj tu kawaw a mikawawaj aadup…ôn "mańßiniaj mikawawaj a wa ¶u Ē~ °, patigamiaj a banur~…ĺ, mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu mam…ônu Ē~ °aj a subaju". mikawawaj aadup…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a r~…ĺikisi namakajzaaj ajaw r~…ĺikisi a tad…ômaw, tusu a kasazuma katar~…ĺar~…ĺan, subaju. ** s…ô- ¶i t…ôban a mińß ¶aan tu zik…ôz, u katar~…ĺar~…ĺan, subaju u mikawawaj aadup…ôn mapakutaj nu simar~…ĺ autubaj. . misiwkaj ** tad…ômaw mi ¶ukajmas tu nipańßabajaj aadup…ôn mumukuaj tu bak…ôtaj a an ¶a mit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu sakar~…ĺuk a duku mat…ôn…ôs tu mińß ¶aan, ajaw nu si-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan, namapańßabaj ku aadup…ôn ńßawsa, mar~…ĺa u mikutajaj tu tad…ômaw nu mimuku tu bak…ôtaj a tuud. . tinaku katar~…ĺar~…ĺan nu m…ô-su-pu-ta-mi-ja, p…ô-o aj a nipańßabajan a Ňčabur~…ĺ. u mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč aadup…ôn ku mańßiniaj, na ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ, ajaw nu si-j…ôn tu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu i in-tu, ajaw nu si-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i aj- ¶i, ajaw nu si-j…ôn tu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu i ¶oŇč-kow, zuma, iŇč-kowaj katukuńß ajaw nu si-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan kja mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw tu mańßiniaj a nar~…ĺimaan. tad…ômaw mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu aadup…ôn mi ¶ukajmas tu aadup…ôn mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj, u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu ku mańßiniaj a pi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °. ajaw mi ¶ukajmas tu kikaj ku tad…ômaw, ujni dada Ē~ ° u ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °. sakańß…ônur~…ĺan u mikawawaj aadup…ôn. naajawaj a r~…ĺikisi atu m…ô-su-pu-ta-mi-ja kanatar~…ĺ. subaju, u sapit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu kaziz…ôŇč an ¶a sar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw, mańßiniaj subaju kaziz…ôŇč. r~…ĺi, adidi Ē~ ° ku nikan, mi ¶id…ôkaj a utubaj atu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč mikunuj. ij- ¶i i ajaw nu si-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan mi ¶ukajmas tu, r~…ĺow, pikidamsajan tu r~…ĺi, subaju atu r~…ĺi mar~…ĺasńß…ô ¶i ku kakatakis. wa ¶u, mit…ôŇčt…ôŇča Ē~ ° i sur~…ĺ…ôda a wa ¶u, wa ¶u nu tajr~…ĺi, mis…ôb…ôŇčaj a wa ¶u Ē~ °, miŇčaajaj a wa ¶u Ē~ °, miadup…ô a wa ¶u Ē~ ° mikir~…ĺimaj a wa ¶u Ē~ °, pańßutinaj a wa ¶u Ē~ ° pazazanaj tu mam…ônu Ē~ °aj a wa ¶u kańßatini. zo, nan-ja atu tuŇč-nan-ja kanatar~…ĺ, u sapir~…ĺais ku zo atu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan. damsajaj a Ňčabur~…ĺ, u si…ônawaj a kanatar~…ĺ. r~…ĺow-to, r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a kanatar~…ĺ. ta-jaŇč-to, nan-m…ô tar~…ĺakawaj buju Ē~ ° a kanatar~…ĺ. nipańßabanaj a pabuj, tan…ôŇč sapikir~…ĺim tu suŇč-r~…ĺu. nani Ē~ °, u mipatajaj tu …ôdu. ju, aŇčaŇčan u muŇč-j…ôn-tjaw, u sapiadup. nipańßabajan a banur~…ĺ, namapańßabaj mar~…ĺa u tigami a banur~…ĺ zikuz tan…ôŇč u mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj nu patajzaaj tu ¶udad a banur~…ĺ. makatar~…ĺaj nu mizak…ôpaj tu ajam, mańßiniaj ¶in-tjaw, r~…ĺi- ¶…ô-iŇč, ju- ¶in, ńßuŇč-wi-kwaŇč, u sapiadup tu par~…ĺaŇč. r~…ĺu- ¶…ô, tuŇč-nan-ja a kitizaan, u sapibutiŇč a r~…ĺu- ¶…ô. **: . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == miculu' u icelang nu aadupen singangan aca tu miculu'ay aadupen, kunuyanay miculu', u mikitaduay tu icelang nu aadupen miculu'. malecad tu micukaymasay tu icelang nu tademaw a miculu', u matenesay tu ku mahiniay u mipiculu'ay. ayaw u kikay dada' ku sapiculu' nu tademaw, tabaki ku nipaini nu aadupen tu tademaw. mikitadu ku tademaw tu aadupen pawapen tu cayay kalecad a kawaw, tinaku miculuay tu tademaw anca miculu' tu tuud, saculil atu pakatineng. mahiniay ku picukaymas nu tademaw, taneng kakelul mikacaw i uzip nu aadupen, u sapiedap aduku anca miecaw tu aadupen lunukay mikawaw. mapaecaw, pahabay mala u sapiculu' aadupen pangangan han kunuy aadupen, zuma angangan kacawanay nu tademaw nu mikunuyay aadupen hina mapangangan tu malu u kakacawen mueneng. zuma a tademaw amisungaay tu balucu' nu tau, mitengil tu nipiculcul nu tau, culculan, cayay paacaenay ku piedap a miculu' tu baketay a tuud, mahiza miecaw tu mala miculu'ay aadupen, i lalangawanay tu mahiniay a tademaw atu misungaay tu tau a wayway pangangan han tu "kunuyay aadupen" mikawaway aadupen "working animal" mikawaway aadupen miedapay mikawaw tu tademaw a lumaay aadupen atu nipahabayan aadupen, u pasu miculu'ay tu tuud nu mikakawaway aadupen "mahiniay low-tow, mikunuyay a subayu", u mitengtengay aadupen "mahiniay mitengtengay a subayu, malukay a katalalan, mitengtengay a wacu i suleda" atu pakatenengay tu kawaw a mikawaway aadupen "mahiniay mikawaway a wacu', patigamiay a banul, mikeliday tu mamenu'ay a subayu". mikawaway aadupen a lalekalan a likisi namakayzaay ayaw likisi a tademaw, tusu a kasazuma katalalan, subayu. 20 se-ci teban a mihcaan tu zikez, u katalalan, subayu u mikawaway aadupen mapakutay nu simal autubay. . misiwkay Áį°šĽč tademaw micukaymas tu nipahabayay aadupen mumukuay tu baketay a anca mitengteng tu sakaluk a duku matenes tu mihcaan, ayaw nu si-yen 9000 a mihcaan, namapahabay ku aadupen hawsa, mala u mikutayay tu tademaw nu mimuku tu baketay a tuud. . tinaku katalalan nu Mey-su-pu-ta-mi-ya, Pey-o ay a nipahabayan a ngabul. u mitengtengay tu kazizeng aadupen ku mahiniay, nacaliway tu kalalacal, ayaw nu si-yen tu 2500 a mihcaan katukuh tu i In-tu, ayaw nu si-yen 1600 a mihcaan katukuh i Ay-ci, ayaw nu si-yen tu 1300 a mihcaan katukuh tu i Cong-kow, zuma, Ing-koway katukuh ayaw nu si-yen 500 a mihcaan kya malingatu mikawaw tu mahiniay a nalimaan. tademaw miculu'ay miculu' u icelang nu tademaw. malecad tu aadupen micukaymas tu aadupen miculu'ay, u matenesay tu ku mahiniay a piculu'. ayaw micukaymas tu kikay ku tademaw, uyni dada' u culu'. sakahenulan u mikawaway aadupen. naayaway a likisi atu Mey-su-pu-ta-mi-ya kanatal. subayu, u sapitengteng tu kazizeng anca salepacaw, mahiniay subayu kazizeng. li, adidi' ku nikan, micidekay a utubay atu icelang mikunuy. Iy-ci i ayaw nu si-yen 3000 a mihcaan micukaymas tu, Low, pikidamsayan tu li, subayu atu li malasheci ku kakatakis. wacu, mitengtenga' i suleda a wacu, wacu nu tayli, misebengay a wacu', mingaayay a wacu', miadupey a wacu' mikilimay a wacu', pahutinay a wacu' pazazanay tu mamenu'ay a wacu kahatini. zo, Nan-ya atu Tung-nan-ya kanatal, u sapilais ku zo atu miculu' i kilakilangan. damsayay a ngabul, u sienaway a kanatal. low-to, likelikenan a kanatal. ta-yang-to, Nan-mey talakaway buyu' a kanatal. nipahabanay a pabuy, taneng sapikilim tu sung-lu. nani', u mipatayay tu edu. yu, angangan u mung-yen-tyaw, u sapiadup. nipahabayan a banul, namapahabay mala u tigami a banul zikuz taneng u mibahelay nu patayzaay tu cudad a banul. makatalay nu mizakepay tu ayam, mahiniay cin-tyaw, li-ce-ing, yu-cin, hung-wi-kwang, u sapiadup tu palang. lu-ce, Tung-nan-ya a kitizaan, u sapibuting a lu-ce. Śģ∂ťīŅ: . malalitin tu i hekalay tu zumaay a natinengan

mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu mi ¶ukajmasaj tu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw a mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °, u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu ku mańßiniaj u mipi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj. ajaw u kikaj dada Ē~ ° ku sapi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° nu tad…ômaw, tabaki ku nipaini nu aadup…ôn tu tad…ômaw. mikitadu ku tad…ômaw tu aadup…ôn pawap…ôn tu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kawaw, tinaku mi ¶ur~…ĺuaj tu tad…ômaw an ¶a mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu tuud, sa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ atu pakatin…ôŇč. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawanaj tu mańßiniaj a tad…ômaw atu misuŇčaaj tu tau a wajwaj paŇčaŇčan ńßan tu "kunujaj aadup…ôn" mikawawaj aadup…ôn "workiŇč animar~…ĺ" mikawawaj aadup…ôn mi…ôdapaj mikawaw tu tad…ômaw a r~…ĺumaaj aadup…ôn atu nipańßabajan aadup…ôn, u pasu mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj tu tuud nu mikakawawaj aadup…ôn "mańßiniaj r~…ĺow-tow, mikunujaj a subaju", u mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj aadup…ôn "mańßiniaj mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a subaju, mar~…ĺukaj a katar~…ĺar~…ĺan, mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj a wa ¶u i sur~…ĺ…ôda" atu pakat…ôn…ôŇčaj tu kawaw a mikawawaj aadup…ôn "mańßiniaj mikawawaj a wa ¶u Ē~ °, patigamiaj a banur~…ĺ, mik…ôr~…ĺidaj tu mam…ônu Ē~ °aj a subaju". mikawawaj aadup…ôn a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan a r~…ĺikisi namakajzaaj ajaw r~…ĺikisi a tad…ômaw, tusu a kasazuma katar~…ĺar~…ĺan, subaju. ** s…ô- ¶i t…ôban a mińß ¶aan tu zik…ôz, mat…ôn…ôs tu mińß ¶aan, ajaw nu si-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan, namapańßabaj ku aadup…ôn ńßawsa, mar~…ĺa u mikutajaj tu tad…ômaw nu mimuku tu bak…ôtaj a tuud. . tinaku katar~…ĺar~…ĺan nu m…ô-su-pu-ta-mi-ja, p…ô-o aj a nipańßabajan a Ňčabur~…ĺ. u mit…ôŇčt…ôŇčaj tu kaziz…ôŇč aadup…ôn ku mańßiniaj, na ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺa ¶ar~…ĺ, ajaw nu si-j…ôn tu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu i in-tu, ajaw nu si-j…ôn **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß i aj- ¶i, ajaw nu si-j…ôn tu **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu i ¶oŇč-kow, zuma, iŇč-kowaj katukuńß ajaw nu si-j…ôn *** a mińß ¶aan kja mar~…ĺiŇčatu mikawaw tu mańßiniaj a nar~…ĺimaan. tad…ômaw mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ ° u i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč nu tad…ômaw. mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu aadup…ôn mi ¶ukajmas tu aadup…ôn mi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °aj, u mat…ôn…ôsaj tu ku mańßiniaj a pi ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °. ajaw mi ¶ukajmas tu kikaj ku tad…ômaw, ujni dada Ē~ ° u ¶ur~…ĺu Ē~ °. sakańß…ônur~…ĺan u mikawawaj aadup…ôn. naajawaj a r~…ĺikisi atu m…ô-su-pu-ta-mi-ja kanatar~…ĺ. subaju, u sapit…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu pikidamsajan tu r~…ĺi, subaju atu r~…ĺi mar~…ĺasńß…ô ¶i ku kakatakis. wa ¶u, mit…ôŇčt…ôŇča Ē~ ° i sur~…ĺ…ôda a wa ¶u, wa ¶u nu tajr~…ĺi, mis…ôb…ôŇčaj a wa ¶u Ē~ °, miŇčaajaj a wa ¶u Ē~ °, miadup…ô a kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan. damsajaj a Ňčabur~…ĺ, u si…ônawaj a kanatar~…ĺ. r~…ĺow-to, r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a kanatar~…ĺ. ta-jaŇč-to, nan-m…ô tar~…ĺakawaj buju Ē~ ° a kanatar~…ĺ. nipańßabanaj a pabuj, tan…ôŇč sapikir~…ĺim tu suŇč-r~…ĺu. nani Ē~ °, u mipatajaj tu …ôdu. ju, aŇčaŇčan u muŇč-j…ôn-tjaw, u sapiadup. nipańßabajan a banur~…ĺ, namapańßabaj mar~…ĺa u tigami a banur~…ĺ zikuz tan…ôŇč u mibańß…ôr~…ĺaj
